news.headline: Ghana's President in talks with IMF to improve program, aiming for economic stability.
Verizon (NYSE, NASDAQ: VZ) to redeem debt securities on March 18, 2025.
news.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE, NASDAQ: VZ) has disclosed the redemption of certain notes on March 18, 2025. The announcement was made on February 14, 2025, in New York. The specific details of the notes and redemption process were not provided in the news release.

news.headline: 2025 Nassau Paradise Island Wine & Food Festival lineup includes Alon Shaya, Bobby Flay, JJ Johnson, José Andrés, among others, with musical performances by GRAMMY® award-winners.
news.summary: The lineup for the third annual festival has been announced, featuring acclaimed chefs such as Alon Shaya, Bobby Flay, JJ Johnson, José Andrés, Kardea Brown, Katie Lee, Michael Symon, and Michael White, as well as local Bahamian chefs and restaurateurs. In addition to the culinary talent, there will be musical performances by a GRAMMY® Award-winner.

news.headline: Establishment Labs (NASDAQ: ESTA) to announce Q4 2024 financial results on Feb 26. Conference call at 4:30 pm ET. Dial (877) 407-8037 to participate.
news.summary: Establishment Labs Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: ESTA), a global medical technology company focused on enhancing women’s health, specifically in breast aesthetics and reconstruction, is set to disclose its financial performance for the quarter concluding December 31, 2024. The announcement will be made after market closure on Wednesday, February 26, 2025. Subsequently, a conference call will be held at 4:30 pm ET on the same day to deliberate on these results. Those interested can join the call by dialing (877) 407-8037 (U.S.).

news.headline: CBL Properties (NYSE: CBL) reported strong Q4 & 2024 results in Chattanooga, Tenn, with financial statements prepared according to GAAP.
news.summary: CBL Properties disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2024. The reported results conform to GAAP standards. Further details on supplemental non-GAAP financial metrics and their reconciliation with respective GAAP figures can be found in the full press release. For the three months ending December 31, 2024, and the entire fiscal year, the company's financial outcomes were revealed following the standards set by GAAP.

news.headline: Sprinklr to release Q4 & full year 2025 financial results on March 12, 2025. Market open announcement.
news.summary: Sprinklr, a leading customer experience management company, will be releasing its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal 2025 before the market opens on March 12, 2025. Investors and analysts are eagerly awaiting the report to gain insights into the company's performance during this period. This announcement signifies an important milestone for Sprinklr as stakeholders anticipate key numbers and data that will provide a comprehensive overview of its financial standing and operational success for the specified periods.

news.headline: Lexmark recognized as leader in Cloud Managed Print Services by IDC Marketscape for excelence in AI, security, and document workflow optimization.
news.summary: Lexmark, a leading provider of imaging and IoT solutions based in Lexington, Kentucky, has been recognized for its exceptional performance in artificial intelligence, security, and document workflow enhancement by IDC Marketscape. The report highlights Lexmark's dedication to delivering high-quality managed print services (MPS) and cloud solutions. This recognition comes as Lexmark continues to prioritize innovation and excellence in its offerings. The report, released on February 14, 2025, underscores Lexmark's success in these key areas, reaffirming its position as a top performer in the industry.

news.headline: ProFrac Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: ACDC) to release Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 6, 2025, 11:00 a.m. Eastern.
news.summary: In Willow Park, Texas, ProFrac Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: ACDC) revealed plans to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 before hosting a conference call on Thursday, March 6, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. ET / 10:00 a.m. CT. To participate in the event and view the webcast, interested parties can register by clicking on the provided link. Following the call, a recording of the webcast will be accessible in the IR Calendar section of the company's website.

news.headline: TT platform wins Derivatives Trading System of the Year at FOW International Awards for 3rd time in a row.
news.summary: Trading Technologies International, Inc. (TT), a provider of global capital markets technology platform services, has secured its third consecutive win for the Derivatives Trading System of the Year award. The company received this recognition in both Chicago and London on February 14, 2025. This achievement highlights TT's industry-leading performance in the derivatives trading sector.

news.headline: UNLEASH and The Josh Bersin Company partner to shape AI in HR, leading authority on HR, talent, and AI-driven workforce.
news.summary: Las Vegas, on February 14, 2025 - A notable collaboration has been confirmed between UNLEASH and The Josh Bersin Company, two distinguished entities in the HR industry. UNLEASH, a renowned event and media platform for HR advancements, has joined forces with The Josh Bersin Company, a prominent figure specializing in HR, talent management, and AI-driven workforce evolution. This partnership signifies a significant step forward in the realm of HR innovation.

news.headline: ICM announces 2025 Impact Awards in NY, honoring 3 recipients in Washington, D.C. - Brian Trelstad, Cynthia Muller, and Kendall Bedford.
news.summary: Three individuals, Brian Trelstad, Cynthia Muller, and Kendall Bedford, are set to be recognized in Washington, D.C. Brian Trelstad was named one of the three recipients of the Impact Awards by the Impact Capital Managers (ICM) membership association. The awards ceremony is scheduled to take place in New York on an unspecified date in February 2025. This marks the third year that the Impact Awards will be presented.

news.headline: Kexing Biopharm's GB05 IND approved by U.S. FDA. Human Interferon α1b Inhalation Solution. Stock Code: 688136.SH.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on February 14, 2025, Kexing Biopharm Co., Ltd. (Stock Code: 688136.SH) made public the news regarding the approval of the Investigational New Drug Application (IND) for GB05, a Human Interferon α1b Inhalation Solution. This product was developed in-house by the company's wholly-owned subsidiary.

news.headline: Pyxus International's CFO, Flavia Landsberg, resigns on February 28, 2025.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, in Morrisville, North Carolina, Pyxus International, Inc., a global agricultural company, made public the resignation of Flavia Landsberg, their executive vice president and CFO. This change will be effective from February 28, 2025. Pyxus International, Inc. is listed on OTC Pink under the ticker symbol PYYX.

news.headline: BGC Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: BGC) reports Q4 & full year 2024 results, declares 2 cents quarterly dividend.
news.summary: BGC Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: BGC) has announced a quarterly dividend of 2 cents and will hold a conference call today at 11:00 AM ET to discuss its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. The company declared these results in New York on February 14, 2025. Investors can participate in the call to gain insights into the performance and strategic outlook of BGC Group, Inc.

news.headline: Snail Games reaches key milestones with new content for ARK franchise, including ARK: Ultimate Mobile Edition.
news.summary: A renowned global developer and publisher of interactive digital entertainment, Snail Games (Nasdaq: SNAL), based in Culver City, California, announced on February 14, 2025, significant milestones in the evolution of the ARK universe. The company introduced the expansion of the franchise with ARK: Ultimate Mobile Edition.

news.headline: AAM's Q4 2024 saw $1.38B in sales, reporting solid full-year 2024 adjusted EBITDA growth.
news.summary: AAM announced strong growth in adjusted EBITDA for the full year 2024 in Detroit on February 14, 2025. American Axle & Manufacturing Holdings, Inc. (AAM), listed as AXL on NYSE, revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year 2024. In the fourth quarter alone, AAM recorded sales totaling $1.38 billion.

news.headline: XRP up 10% to $2.70 as SEC acknowledges ETF filing, potentially leading to Wall Street adoption.
news.summary: XRP has regained attention as the SEC acknowledged the filing of a spot XRP ETF by Grayscale and NYSE Arca, potentially expediting XRP's adoption on Wall Street. Currently, XRP is priced at $2.70, marking a 10% increase over the past 24 hours. This surge surpasses other major cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin trading at $96,600 (+0.7%) and Ethereum standing at $2,682 (+0.7%). The market's focus on XRP intensifies as it outshines its counterparts. It is noteworthy that XRP's resilience contrasts with the slight dips in Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Dogecoin. The cryptocurrency community has long been advocating for wider acceptance and integration of digital assets into traditional financial systems.

news.headline: Tornabene Wine wins 3 Silver Medals at 2025 SF Chronicle Wine Competition, largest in US.284 characters
news.summary: In a recent development, Tornabene Wine has been gaining attention in the wine sector by securing three Silver Medals at the 2025 San Francisco Chronicle Wine Competition, renowned as the leading competition for American wines. Notably, the brand's 2022 Tornabene Wine Cabernet Sauvignon and two other variants were the recipients of these prestigious awards. This recognition highlights Tornabene Wine's excellence in the industry and solidifies their position as a noteworthy player in the market.

news.headline: DOGE operation led by Elon Musk making waves in Washington with provocative claims to reshape govt and cut spending.
news.summary: In a short period since the beginning of the DOGE operation, numerous bold statements have been made by Elon Musk regarding the initiative he heads to drastically transform the federal government. He aims to reduce regulatory scrutiny of private sector, curtail government spending, and instigate significant changes.

news.headline: Secured Overnight Financing rate 4.33% February 13th vs 4.32% February 12th.
AM General showcases JLTV A2 at IDEX 2025 as production starts. Display at Booth #02B-08, Hall 2, U.S. Pavilion.
news.summary: AM General, a prominent maker of tactical military vehicles and mobility systems, is set to showcase the latest JLTV A2 at the upcoming International Defense Exhibition (IDEX) from February 17 to 21, 2025. The event will take place in Abu Dhabi at Booth #02B-08, Hall 2, U.S. Pavilion. This exhibition is expected to draw a large audience, with visitors eager to witness the unveiling of the JLTV A2 and witness the advanced features it offers.

news.headline: Agnico Eagle Mines had an exceptional year in 2024, producing 3.49 million ounces of gold, reducing debt, and returning nearly $1 billion to shareholders. CEO highlights cost control efforts as AISC stands at $1,239 for the full year.
news.summary: The third-largest gold miner, Agnico Eagle Mines (NYSE:AEM), showcased a stellar performance in 2024. Amid a cost-conscious strategy, the company achieved exceptional financial and operational results. CEO Anmar Al-Joundi highlighted the record-breaking achievements, including robust operating margins, substantial debt reduction, and returning nearly $1 billion to shareholders. The miner surpassed its production guidance by producing 3.49 million ounces of gold throughout the year, maintaining stable output. In Q4 alone, Agnico Eagle reported 847,401 ounces at an all-in-sustaining cost (AISC) of $1,316 per ounce, with a full-year AISC of $1,239 meeting expectations. The company generated an unprecedented $2.14 billion in annual free cash flow, with strong operational cash flow.

news.headline: AMC Networks reported $2.4 billion in net revenues for the full year 2024, with net revenues decreasing 11.7% in the fourth quarter. Streaming revenues increased by 7% to $603 million, with 12.4 million subscribers as of December 31, 2024. Adjusted EPS was $3.86 for the full year and $0.64 for the fourth quarter. Free Cash Flow reached $331 million for the full year. Impairment and other charges were $399.5 million in 2024. The Company had 32,651,186 shares of Class A Common Stock and 11,484,408 shares of Class B Common Stock outstanding as of February 7, 2025.
news.summary: AMC Networks Inc. reported financial results for Q4 and full year 2024, including net revenues of $599.3 million for Q4 and $2.42 billion for the full year. They achieved a healthy free cash flow of $331 million for the full year, with streaming revenues increasing by 7% to $603 million and streaming subscribers reaching 12.4 million. The operating loss for the year was $40 million, with diluted EPS at $(5.10). They completed significant affiliate renewals, signed a multi-year renewal with Amazon Prime Video Channels, and continued expanding their FAST channels business. The company conducted impairment and other charges of $399.5 million and restructuring charges of $49.5 million in 2024. Additionally, AMC Networks did not repurchase any shares during the year and had 32,651,186 shares of Class A Common Stock and 11,484,408 shares of Class B Common Stock outstanding as of December 31, 2024. Adjusted Operating Income increased 28.8% to $129.2 million for Q4, with Adjusted EPS at $0.64. The company uses Adjusted Operating Income and Free Cash Flow as key performance indicators. For more details, refer to the Company's Form 10-K for further information. The financial results were discussed in a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on February 14, 2025.

news.headline: GCL reports Q1 FY2025 revenues of $50.9M; 41% YoY growth, gross margin 13.8%, net loss $0.8M, EBITDA $1.5M.
news.summary: GCL Global Holdings Ltd. announced its financial results for the six months ending September 30, 2024, reporting revenues of $50.9 million, a 41% increase from the previous year, with a gross margin of 13.8%. The net loss decreased to $0.8 million from $1.9 million, and adjusted EBITDA reached $1.5 million. The company focused on efficiency, resulting in lower marketing expenses. Total operating expenses rose to $8.1 million. As of September 30, 2024, they held $10.3 million in cash. A recent business combination with RFAC Acquisition Corp. was completed. GCL also acquired 20% of NEKCOM Inc. with global publishing rights for an upcoming game. Total assets were reported at $62.4 million, while total liabilities stood at $46.6 million. Non-GAAP measures were used to provide financial insights. Crocker Coulson manages investor relations for GCL.

news.headline: Incannex Healthcare Inc. reports positive IHL-42X PK findings for OSA treatment, with Q2 2025 net loss of $6.3M USD.
news.summary: Incannex Healthcare Inc. announced positive results from a pharmacokinetics (PK) and safety study of IHL-42X, an oral treatment for Obstructive Sleep Apnea (OSA), showing bioavailability and confirming delivery of both drug components. They reported a net loss of $6.3 million USD for the quarter ended December 31, 2024, with cash and cash equivalents at $2.1 million USD. The company also appointed a new OSA Clinical Advisory Board, including Dr. Alison Wimms from ResMed. The Phase 2/3 RePOSA clinical trial for OSA is in progress, with sites in the U.S., U.K., and European Union. The global Phase 2/3 RePOSA study aims to evaluate IHL-42X in OSA patients. Additionally, the company is focusing on its other programs like IHL-675A for rheumatoid arthritis and PSX-001 for Generalized Anxiety Disorder.

news.headline: Boston Pizza Royalties Income Fund reported $931.7M Franchise Sales for 2024, yielding $234.2M in Q4, with increases in Same Restaurant Sales and Distributable Cash. Payout Ratios were 118.4% for Q4, 99.9% for the year. Cash balance stood at $4.6M. Monthly distribution rate increased to $0.113 per unit and $0.115 per unit in 2024. Special cash distribution of $0.075 per unit declared on Dec 9, 2024. Earned $6.6M in net income for the period. Fund declared distributions amounting to $11.3M in Q4. Full details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Boston Pizza Royalties Income Fund and Boston Pizza International Inc. reported financial results for the fourth quarter period from October 1, 2024, to December 31, 2024, and for the year ending December 31, 2024. Highlights include the highest ever fourth quarter and annual Franchise Sales of $234.2 million and $931.7 million, representing increases of 2.9% and 0.6%, respectively, versus the prior year. Same Restaurant Sales were 3.4% for the period and 0.9% for the year. Cash flows from operating activities were $9.4 million for the period and $38.1 million for the year. Distributable Cash increased 1.5% for the period but decreased 0.9% for the year. Payout Ratio was 118.4% for the period and 99.9% for the year. The Fund declared a distribution of $0.115 per Unit for January 2025. The Fund paid distributions totaling $455.8 million or $27.57 per Unit. Key financials show an increase in Franchise Sales, net income, and Distributable Cash, along with changes in distributions over the years. The Fund's total revenue for 2024 was $49.51 million, with 372 restaurants in the Royalty Pool. This information is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Magna Q4 beats estimates with $10.63B sales, operating income $381M, adjusted EBIT $689M, EPS $1.69 amid EV uncertainty.
news.summary: Magna International Inc (NYSE:MGA) saw a drop in premarket trading on Friday despite reporting a 2% year-on-year increase in fourth-quarter sales to $10.63 billion. This exceeded the analyst consensus of $10.34 billion. Within the business segments, Body Exteriors & Structures sales fell by 3%, Power & Vision remained steady, Seating Systems rose by 6%, and Complete Vehicles sales jumped by 17%. Operating income before income taxes for the quarter stood at $381 million, resulting in an operating margin of 3.6%. Adjusted EBIT reached $689 million, with an adjusted EBIT margin of 6.5%. The adjusted EPS of $1.69 surpassed the expected $1.52 per share.

news.headline: Bybit off France's AMF blacklist, aims for MiCA license in EU; grappling with regulations in India, Malaysia.
news.summary: After being removed from the French AMF blacklist, Bybit is now applying for a MiCA license in the EU. Despite these advancements, the cryptocurrency exchange is encountering regulatory obstacles in both India and Malaysia. The company's efforts to expand are notable, especially considering the significant number of potential users in these regions.

news.headline: German President Steinmeier: We will have to spend more on defence than the current NATO target of 2% of GDP.
Russian Urals oil prices fall below the western price cap in the baltic on weaker Brent, and firmer freight costs, according to calculations.
GameStop stock rises 8.6% before market on reports of Bitcoin investments. Shares surged up to 20% in extended trading.
news.summary: GameStop Corp. (NYSE:GME) saw its stock rise by 8.6% in pre-market trading on Friday following reports of potential investments in bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies. The company is considering diversifying its investments into alternative assets, particularly focusing on bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), as reported by CNBC. This news caused GameStop's shares to surge by as much as 20% in after-hours trading. However, the company is still evaluating whether investing in cryptocurrencies aligns with its overall business strategy and may ultimately decide against it, according to a source familiar with the matter. GameStop had previously introduced crypto wallets in 2022.

news.headline: Global Base Metals Directory 2025 includes detailed info for 3,000+ miners, producers, traders of aluminum, copper, lead, nickel, tin, zinc.
news.summary: A report titled "Global Base Metals Directory 2025" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The directory provides in-depth company profiles of over 3,000 miners, producers, and traders in the aluminum, copper, lead, nickel, tin, and zinc markets. It offers comprehensive and current information on companies operating in these sectors. The Global Base Metals Directory caters to those involved in the supply chain of base metals.

news.headline: Albany International plans to close facility in Italy, shift production to Merone; consultation with employees ongoing.
news.summary: Albany International Italia Srl, a subsidiary of Albany International Corp. (NYSE:AIN), has declared its intention to cease manufacturing operations at a rented site in Ballo, Italy. The company will be transferring its production to a plant in Merone, Italy, owned by Industrie Tessili Bresciane Srl, another subsidiary of Albany International Corp. Employee representatives will engage in consultations regarding this decision. The move is contingent upon compliance with local regulations.

news.headline: AbbVie CEO Robert A. Michael appointed Chairman as Richard A. Gonzalez retires from board on July 1, 2025.
news.summary: Effective July 1, 2025, Richard A. Gonzalez will step down from the board of directors in North Chicago, Illinois. AbbVie (NYSE: ABBV) disclosed on February 14, 2025, that CEO Robert A. Michael has been unanimously elected by the board of directors to take on the role.

news.headline: Vac-Con partners with Cate Equipment to expand reach in Utah as the official dealer, strengthening presence in the western U.S.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, in Green Cove Springs, Florida, Vac-Con, Inc., known for manufacturing top-notch vacuum and hydro excavation equipment, announced the appointment of Cate Equipment as its official dealer for Utah. This collaboration marks Vac-Con's push into the western United States region.

Moderna relies on pipeline to boost struggling stock.
X’s revenue increased by 40% last year - NYT.
Investigation initiated against prominent Turkish businessman Omer Aras and a banker; details undisclosed.
Barclays Bank reveals $131M BlackRock Bitcoin ETF holdings, owning 2,473,064 shares of IBIT as of December 31: SEC filing.
news.summary: A British bank currently owns 2,473,064 shares of IBIT, which were reported to be valued at $131 million in a recent SEC filing dated December 31st.

news.headline: Owens Corning selling glass reinforcements business to Praana Group for $755 million.
news.summary: In a joint statement released today, Owens Corning (NYSE: OC), a prominent company in residential and commercial building products, and Praana Group, a diverse India-based holding group focusing on industrial sectors, have confirmed the finalization of a deal. The agreement entails the sale of Owens Corning's glass reinforcements business to Praana Group and its subsidiaries for a total enterprise value of $755,000,000. This strategic move is part of Owens Corning's ongoing business optimization efforts.

news.headline: BingX Labs invests $100,000 in Fireverse for AI music innovation in Web3 initiatives.
news.summary: In Panama City on February 14, 2025, it was reported that BingX Labs, a branch of the BingX cryptocurrency exchange, has disclosed a significant investment of $100,000 in Fireverse. Fireverse is a cutting-edge music creation platform that utilizes AI and blockchain technology. The investment is part of a strategic partnership between the two companies designed to boost the advancement of the platform and its services.

news.headline: Monro, Inc. (Nasdaq: MNRO) declares quarterly cash dividend of $.28 per share to be paid on March 11, 2025.
news.summary: Monro, Inc., a prominent provider of automotive undercar repair and tire services, recently disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.28 per share on its common stock, which includes shares allotted to holders of Class C Convertible Preferred Stock. This dividend will be distributed on March 11, 2025, to shareholders as of February [XX], 2025.

news.summary: The CPSR ETF, launched on March 3, 2025, is estimated to have an upside cap range of 7.29%-7.65% over the one-year period following its launch. Similarly, the CPNM ETF has an estimated upside cap range...

news.headline: First Horizon announces retirement of Director Rosa Sugrañes at 67. Effective end of current term.
news.summary: First Horizon Corporation, a renowned financial institution trading under the ticker symbols FHN on NYSE, disclosed on February 14, 2025, the retirement of Rosa Sugrañes, aged 67, from her positions on the First Horizon Corporation Board of Directors and First Horizon Bank Board of Directors. The retirement will be official at the conclusion of her current term...

news.headline: Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE: FRT) promotes key leadership team members to drive long-term growth.
news.summary: Enhancing Knowledge to Fuel Sustainable Expansion NORTH BETHESDA, Maryland, February 14, 2025 -- Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE: FRT) revealed significant leadership changes aimed at solidifying the company's dedication to strategic development and operational proficiency.

news.headline: Tariff implementation date moved to April.
Dow Jones Futures drop due to Trump tariff news; S&P 500 near record highs. Coinbase, Twilio, Roku report earnings.
news.summary: The S&P 500 is hovering close to its all-time high amidst news that new tariffs announced by President Trump will not be implemented immediately. Investors are advised to monitor the situation closely. Stocks such as Coinbase, Twilio, and Roku featured prominently in recent earnings releases. Dow Jones futures have dipped following the tariff news, bringing the market to the brink of its highs. For guidance on current market conditions, consult Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Chile's loyalty programs market is forecasted to grow at a 14% CAGR to reach $652.4 million by 2029, with a $383.2 million target in 2025.
news.summary: A report on the Chile Loyalty Programs Market reveals that the industry is projected to experience a 16.8% annual growth rate, reaching a value of US$383.2 million by 2025. This market has demonstrated a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 18.9% between 2020 and 2022. The report, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, provides insights into over 50 Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) related to loyalty program trends across various sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics as of Q1 2025.

news.headline: LONGi keeps AAA ranking in Q4 2024 PV ModuleTech Bankability Ratings, 20 consecutive quarters at top tier.
news.summary: In Xi'an, China, on February 14, 2025, LONGi revealed that it has maintained its AAA rating in PV-Tech's Q4 2024 PV ModuleTech bankability ratings. This achievement signifies the company's 20th consecutive quarter at the highest rank, highlighting its enduring dedication to quality and innovation. This consistent rating showcases LONGi's commitment to excellence over the long term.
